sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter / பெயர்ச்சொல் (அஃறிணை)
1. the seventh day of each week, sabbath

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Of Hebrew origin [H7676]; the Sabbath (that is, Shabbath), or day of weekly repose from secular avocations (also the observance or institution itself); by extension a se'nnight, that is, the interval between two Sabbaths; likewise the plural in all the above applications: - sabbath (day), week.
